notes: v349 — CLEARER WORDING: DATA IS LABELLED 'END-OF-DAY', NOT 'LIVE'. The load notice used to read '…2,862 stocks · live · …', which was confusing because these are end-of-day closing prices, not real-time. It now reads 'end-of-day' (hover it for a note: end-of-day closes from the last completed session, fetched just now from the internet — not real-time). The Setup 'FROM THE INTERNET' line and the key prompt now say 'the latest end-of-day prices' too. Nothing about the data or your results changed — just honest labelling, matching how the rest of the app already describes it. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v349. ALSO RECENT — v348 — the Portfolio is redesigned into four clean tabs (Holdings, Pending, History, Performance) with your key numbers pinned at the top, sortable holdings, and row actions tucked into a ⋯ menu. v347 — fixed slow/freezing loads. v346 — ⬆ Export data button in both Simple and Advanced. v344 — pre-open orders fill the same day if the price is hit. (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
